summary: Løkke escalated pressure for a cross-bloc centre deal via Facebook and press, framing the centre-left track as insufficient. Lidegaard pushed back with 'easier to make red parties fiscally responsible than blue parties green.' Cecilie Liv Hansen confirmed she will stay as independent løsgænger.
changelog: Løkke presser eksplicit for tværblok-løsning ('koste hvad det vil')
Blå partier begynder pivot mod centristisk arrangement (40% skift)
Cecilie Liv Hansen bekræfter hun bliver som løsgænger

developments.description: Løkke posted Facebook video before Marienborg meeting: 'Koste hvad det vil' — personal resolve messaging, directional ambiguity maintained but kingmaker posture hardened.
developments.impact: M globalHarshness up; M orientation ambiguity maintained

developments.description: Løkke described formation as 'mere end svært ud' and explicitly pressured S/V/KF to send 'positive signals' toward cross-bloc centre deal. Lidegaard responded: 'det er nemmere at gøre røde partier økonomisk ansvarlige, end at gøre blå partier grønne.'
developments.impact: crossBlocBonus up sharply; M→SF cooling; implicit critique of S+SF+RV landing zone

developments.description: Cecilie Liv Hansen confirmed in podcast interview that she intends to stay in Folketinget as independent. Described expulsion as 'et kæmpechok.'
developments.impact: LG-LA locks in independent status; pFlexible up

parameterChanges.justification: 'Koste hvad det vil' + 'det ser mere end svært ud' = harder bargaining posture
Løkke's cross-bloc framing explicitly deprioritizes centre-left track
Løkke explicitly and publicly making case for cross-bloc; dramatically higher pull toward 'over-the-middle' solutions
Blue PM fading as M pushes cross-bloc; V begins reluctant pivot (40% of total shift)
KF most enthusiastic blue-side pivot (Juul door already ajar); 40% of shift
LA identity constraint limits shift; mainly tolerance/support from outside; 40%
Confirmed she stays as independent; locks in bargaining leverage

structuralChanges.description: Blue løsgænger behavioral model: blue-origin LG seats never support red/center-red governments. Retroactive model correction.

confidenceAssessment: medium-high — Løkke quotes are first-person via Facebook/wire; Lidegaard response is same-window
